name: Barnes & Noble Education, Inc.
business: Barnes & Noble Education, Inc. is one of the largest contract operators of physical and virtual bookstores for college and university campuses and K-12 institutions across the United States, and also a textbook wholesaler and inventory management hardware and software provider.
